lede: Located next to JFK’s Terminal 5, this retro-modern hotel revives the golden age of air travel inside Eero Saarinen’s iconic 1962 TWA Flight Center. Sip cocktails in a vintage 1958 airplane-turned-bar, dine at the Paris Café by Jean-Georges, or explore exhibits by the New-York Historical Society. Enjoy runway views from one of 512 soundproof rooms, take a dip in the rooftop infinity pool, or hit the world’s largest hotel gym. Getting here is easy - the TWA Hotel is accessible via AirTrain. If you are in Terminal 5, just walk through the original TWA Flight Center tubes to reach the hotel. From any other terminal, take the AirTrain to Terminal 5, and follow the signs that take you to the front door of the hotel. 6 Central Terminal Area, Jamaica, NY 11430 +1 (212) 806-9000 Book JFK's only on-site hotel

h3s: Heading to a hotel near JFK?
paragraphs: Located next to JFK’s Terminal 5, this retro-modern hotel revives the golden age of air travel inside Eero Saarinen’s iconic 1962 TWA Flight Center. Sip cocktails in a vintage 1958 airplane-turned-bar, dine at the Paris Café by Jean-Georges, or explore exhibits by the New-York Historical Society. Enjoy runway views from one of 512 soundproof rooms, take a dip in the rooftop infinity pool, or hit the world’s largest hotel gym.

Getting here is easy - the TWA Hotel is accessible via AirTrain. If you are in Terminal 5, just walk through the original TWA Flight Center tubes to reach the hotel. From any other terminal, take the AirTrain to Terminal 5, and follow the signs that take you to the front door of the hotel.

JFK offers a designated hotel shuttle pick-up and drop-off area. Take the AirTrain to Federal Circle opens in a new tab via the Jamaica or Howard Beach AirTrain lines to locate all available hotel shuttles. Confirm with your hotel to see if shuttle service is offered.
The Port Authority of New York and New Jersey 4 World Trade Center, 150 Greenwich Street New York, NY 10007 +1 (212) 435-7000
